---
title: "Reveal.js Presentation"
format: revealjs
---

# Welcome

- This is a Quarto Reveal.js presentation
- Built from `index.qmd`
- Deploys automatically on push with GitHub Actions

---

## Slide 2

1. Use Quarto for authoring
2. Use `revealjs` format
3. Use `docs/` for GitHub Pages output

---

## Slide 3

> Add more sections with `---` between slides.

- Speaker notes can be added using `???`

---

## Thank you

- Visit your published page after deployment
- Customize the content in `index.qmd`
